data.title: What's Going On With Viking Therapeutics, Structure Therapeutics Stock On Monday?
data.description: Pfizer ends danuglipron development after liver safety issue, boosting shares of Viking, Eli Lilly, and Novo Nordisk amid obesity drug competition.

data.title: White House To Reveal Semiconductor Tariff Plan This Week; Michael Saylor Resumes Bitcoin Buying After Brief Pause: 'No Tariffs On Orange Dots'; ConocoPhillips Vs. Occidental: Both Surge On Oil, But Only One Sets The Pace - Top Headlines While the U.S. Slept
MP Materials, The Metals Company Shares Are Moving Higher Monday: Here's Why
data.description: Metals and mining companies including MP Materials Corp (NYSE:MP) and The Metals Company Inc (NASDAQ:TMC) are moving sharply higher Monday morning following reports that the Trump administration plans to stockpile deep-sea metals to counter China.

data.title: Verve Therapeutics Touts Positive Data From Gene Editing Medicine To Lower Cholesterol After Single Dose
data.description: Verve shares Phase 1b results of VERVE-102, showing dose-dependent LDL-C reductions and strong safety in patients with HeFH or premature CAD.

data.title: Energy Secretary Chris Wright Is 'Bullish' As Oil Prices Crater
data.description: Last week, Energy Secretary Chirs Wright spoke positively about the oil and shale industry, despite the steep drop in prices.
